mapper.sql: id, file_code, biz_type, biz_id, original_filename, object_name, bucket_name, content_type, file_ext, file_size, file_hash, storage_provider, status, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_object ( file_code, biz_type, biz_id, original_filename, object_name, bucket_name, content_type, file_ext, file_size, file_hash, storage_provider, status, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{fileCode}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{originalFilename}, #{objectName}, #{bucketName}, #{contentType}, #{fileExt}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{storageProvider}, #{status}, #{uploadedBy}, #{uploadedAt}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM file_object WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM file_object WHERE file_code = #{fileCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM file_object WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE file_object SET status = #{status}, deleted = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETED' THEN 1 ELSE deleted END WHERE id = #{id}
